I’ve been using Spotify since 2020 and used to love it. I used to be very adamant about never changing music apps, but I’m at my limit. 30 seconds used to be LONG for ad breaks, but now they’ve been reaching two minutes. I also used to be able to listen to 5-7 songs straight without ads, but now it’s more 3-4–5 if I’m REALLY lucky. 

Music is one of my biggest coping mechanisms, however I cant even have 15 minutes to myself without an ad. In fact, recently, they’ve changed it so ads will play right after the first song when you decide to start playing music. Not to mention the additional non-audio ads that pop up around the app as well. 

Now, the contents of these ads is another topic entirely. I’m not a purist by any means, but I really don’t enjoy hearing ads sampling a suggestive piece of a smutty audiobook, ESPECIALLY when I’m with family. 

If I hate the ads so much, why don’t I just buy premium? I used to, but then the price rose. And again, and again, and again. It is now THIRTEEN U.S. DOLLARS (fine, $12.99) for a single person. That is ridiculous. 

Additionally, the yearly music wraps have significantly decreased in quality. They used to be fun and accurate, but now parts are very obviously incorrect, nor do they seem to capture activity from the entire year. This is a big disappointment because, as someone who prides themself in listening to a wide range of genres, I loved seeing which ones I had explored each year. However, I began to see less appear in my “wraps” despite knowing very well I had listened to more. Whether it’s due to Spotify shrinking/simplifying genre groups or a lack of effort, I may never know, but it’s frustrating regardless.

Originally I had contemplated one star, but the fact that Spotify does offer a free listening experience grants it another. Nowadays it feels like you have to give an arm and a leg just for the bare minimum, but thankfully this wide range of music isn’t behind a paywall… just yet.

description: Frustrations with playlist management, queue ordering, or broken shuffle modes.

It's heavy, crippled with bugs and just plain bad.

Spotify playback is really lagging: songs, artist profiles, playlists, and podcasts are all consistently loading much slower than they used to. For how much of a drag this is, I think premium subscriptions are overpriced. I’m very glad that Spotify ceased advertising ICE recruitment ads, because I boycotted Spotify as a result of that (and encouraged others to do the same!) Once Spotify stopped airing advertisements for ICE recruitment, I did return to the platform because I enjoy accessing my playlists and podcasts from the same app. That said, now that I’ve returned, user experience has diminished due to the slowness and decrease in playback quality. Also, I wish artists were paid fairly for their work!
The ads I am getting (even on podcasts, not just music) are just annoying. You must remove all ads and just let me listen to my podcasts and music.
This app is very awesome. It allows me to listen to music with very few ads.
Too many ads I can’t listen to a song without the ads being longer than the song

Asked me too rate while typing, 1 stars for making me mad, I very much dislike this disgusting app filled with ads, I will destroy the creator. The creator shall perish, I will make the creator perish, the creator deserves to rot, I’m very unhappy with this app, I think the creator should sit and think about there actions, as I’m very unhappy, help me. I need very good app and this one saddens me, whoever made this needs to fix their app, as it is very bad. I want a good app that makes me happy, not one that saddens me, and this does just the opposite of what I look for in an app.

Good music, more suggestions would be appreciated just as much as less advertisement

worst app. No customer friendly interface. lots of pop ups. Never recommend this app

giving this a new review. the video ads are extremely annoying, and frequently crash my tablet. the ads in general also keep breaking the app where it stops playing a song on repeat after 3 listens. this app has seriously worsened since 2017, and I can no longer say I recommend it.

there were too much ads and what do you mean I can pick a song tomorrow? It's my choice if I wanna listen to music like what? besides all that this app was very good I would love to recommend but with these ads? No

description: Technical issues including app crashes, lag, slow loading times, errors, or freeze glitches.

supporting_reviews.review: recent updates has really messed around with widgets on the phone (latest samsung). 4x1 no longer working and the big one is always loading.

i have reinstalled and clean reinstalled and the issues are clearly with the app itself - it's incredibly, incredibly slow to load even the home screen and takes ages and ages to load any playlist with more than like ten songs. also, if you're scrolling a big playlist, it will just decide not to load anymore and you have to exit the playlist then go back into it for even a chance for it to lame. and the app team just keeping adding dumb, useless features instead of fixing all the glaring issues
Never had an issue before, but recently changed phones and the app won't start ? and is very slow if it does open. is this a known issue? I hope it can be fixed soon.

amazing when its working but 50% of the time it was leave me on a black screen apon opening the app and won't let me play anything or do anything I try restarting the app etc but nothing works! please fix this and I'll change to 5 stars lol
always crashed, doesn't load anymore

Lags forever when opening or doesn't open. Freezes or just sits on black screen. As suggested, I deleted and then downloaded again. Worked fine since then until today and now it only opens a black screen and stays black... So now it's worse than before. Worked for a week or so though...

Love the app but lately I can't even listen to a song without the app glitching and closing. I have had this app since it came out and I don't want to have to look for a new one. Please fix the issue.

hi I just got logged out of my account because the log in link that was supposed to expire in 4 hours expired and I automatically got logged out of my account and when I tried to log in using your Spotify log in link it did not send anything whatsoever despite me trying to do it again and again and after all that trying to get a link it decided to stop "sending" anymore and saying error and now I'm logged out of my account because my password that I saved was incorrect says by your app

I used to love this app, but lately it crashes nonstop. I have closed the app fully, reinstalled, ensured my phone and the app are updated, and cleared the cache but nothing helps. sad. Giving it 2 starts because when it DOES run reliably it is a great app. but also I couldn't get the student pricing to work (this crashes also). edit: dear spotify team, if you read my review you'll see I have reinstalled the app many times 😂😂 thank you 💖

I give tree star only but this app is good pa fix this bug Title: Black Screen Bug - App won't open Issue: All I get is a black screen when I open Spotify. I already tried restarting my phone, clearing cache, and reinstalling the app, but it still doesn't work. I'm on Android

description: Issues with offline playback, downloads, local files, or listening without internet/Wi-Fi.

supporting_reviews.review: I've been a premium Spotify user fo some years now but for some reason, i can't open my app when my phone isn't connected to the Internet. why is that? I have online downloaded music but i can only play song's when my phone is connected to the Internet. That's very bad, because i sometimes go to remote areas where network is poor.
Extremely slow and incompetent app. The loading times are crazy and you need the fastest Internet connection possible just to get decent download speeds. I do not recommend

Ahh! I hate the premium I can't even download a song I like.

it takes very much of my storage data but I still need it so bad that's why I'm not deleting it 😭

supporting_reviews.review: The lyrics function is not working. This used to be a reliable feature, but now it barely works. The app is being filled with unnecessary features that nobody cares about, while the basic functionality is being compromised. The user experience is poor. Maybe the executives are satisfied?
many bugs one of which is I can't press the lyrics of the song
App won't let me share lyrics to snap without blurring the page

The new widget sucks, 4x2 on home screen is madnesss. Bring back the 4x1 widget functions on android. Its fine you want to push the 4x2,but don't be like Microsoft, you put new things in and disable the working old ones. 2 stars for now.

Good UI but bad UX - Scrolling in general is kinda terrible and not smooth at all. It's just janky and breaks a lot. especially on my liked songs library. - Sometimes lyrics don't pop up. - The app in general is lacklustre. Everything feels forced and heavy even after several updates, barely anything has changed even after reinstalling. FIX THESE ISSUES!!!

I have also contacted Spotify Customer Service and they were unable to provide a solution. By all means please provide a real solution.
